Contact

Exchanges and contributions

For serious discussions, questions about the project or proposals for collaboration.

Write

Contact address

For any contact — questions about the project, reactions to a hypothesis, a proposal for contribution or simple curiosity:

tofmuck@frida-ai.fr

Exchanges take place in French or English. A response time of a few days is normal — this is an independent project.

Why write

What the project is looking for

Frida is not a project seeking visibility or a general support network. What interests the project is discussion about the real problems it is trying to solve.

The following are welcome:

  • Critical reactions to published hypotheses
  • Questions about architectural choices
  • Proposals for collaboration on specific problems
  • Indications of related work that has been overlooked or poorly handled
  • Offers of documentary, conceptual or technical contribution

Less relevant: requests for institutional partnership, commercial proposals, generic solicitations.

Contribute

The construction site is open

Frida is a demanding construction site, not a broadly collaborative project. Rigour takes precedence over numbers. That said, serious contributions from complementary backgrounds are actively sought.

Profiles sought

The project sits at the crossroads of several disciplines. Contributions from any of the following directions are useful:

Philosophy of language Hermeneutics Epistemology Language models Software architecture Memory systems Systems design Technical documentation Evaluation and benchmarking

Contributions can take very different forms: critical reading of a document, proposing a more rigorous formulation of a hypothesis, implementing a module, building a test case, writing a synthesis note.

The GitHub repository contains part of the project's open documentation:

View the GitHub repository ↗ Write directly
